Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I played the dating simulator[n]High School of Youth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned the ins and outs of[n]romance and courtship...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I understand a woman's heart more[n]now after wooing the game's heroines...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I practiced some lines and[n]mannerisms that I can use to[n]make a good impression with girls...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I played the fighting game Punch Boxer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I demonstrated my strength by knocking[n]down endless enemies with my fists...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I threw a punch at just the right moment,[n]defeating my foe with a single blow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right, right, left, right... Uppercut...[n]I dominated the opponent...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The equipped Persona's[n]Strength was raised by {f 0 1 45}3{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I played the horror game[n]House of the Deceased.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I fearlessly stood my ground against[n]an oncoming horde of zombies...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The jump scares didn't faze me and I[n]calmly dispatched many zombies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I saw many gruesome scenes, but managed[n]to calmly defeat all my enemies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I played the racing game Real Wheel Racer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I overtook the best racers and felt[n]like I became one with the wind...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I honed my driving techniques and[n]completed the course as fast as lightning...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I drifted close to the apex of every turn[n]and set a new record with my lap time...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The equipped Persona's[n]Agility was raised by {f 0 1 45}3{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I played the quiz game You're the Answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I increased my intelligence by competing[n]against other players from all over Japan...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned from my wrong answers[n]and gained new knowledge...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My mind feels sharper after beating[n]other players with my quick answers...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I played the fortune telling game[n]Edgar's House of Fortunes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Dr. Edgar's dubious-sounding fortunes[n]were actually right on point...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After experiencing a mystical tarot reading,[n]it seems my spiritual power has increased...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After hearing Dr. Edgar's surprisingly accurate[n]fortune, my sixth sense feels sharper...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The equipped Persona's[n]Magic was raised by {f 0 1 45}3{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_NO_UP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But it seems I can no longer[n]improve in this regard...[n]{f 1 1}
